name: Mile High Car Company
description_short: Veteran-owned Colorado Springs used car dealership offering pre-approved auto financing for bad credit, no-down-payment, and first-time buyers, plus on-site repair services.
description_long:
Mile High Car Company is a veteran-owned and operated, family-run used car dealership based in Colorado Springs, Colorado (area code 719). The business prides itself on a stress-free, locally owned experience, distinguishing itself from large franchise dealers. With 993 Google reviews averaging 4.5 stars, it has built a substantial local reputation over multiple years of operation, with repeat customers noted in reviews.

The dealership sells a wide range of used vehicles including SUVs, trucks, cars, and minivans. Every vehicle in inventory comes with a vehicle history report. Financing is a central offering: the company advertises instant pre-approval, a full financing application, and specific programs for consumers who are self-employed, first-time buyers, carrying bad credit, or unable to make a down payment. The on-site service department provides oil changes, tiered vehicle maintenance packages, brake inspections and replacements, tire service, filter replacements, cooling system flushes, and VIN verification — servicing all makes and models with ASE-certified technicians.

What distinguishes Mile High is the combination of in-house financing for credit-challenged buyers with a full-service repair shop under one roof. The purchase process is streamlined to minimize wait time, and customer reviews consistently highlight low-pressure salespeople (Ethan, Christian, Richard, Radu are named), transparent pricing, and a welcoming, family-oriented atmosphere. The service team (Nathan, Ben) also receives specific praise for going beyond standard maintenance.

Honestly, Mile High Car Company is primarily an auto dealership with in-house financing — not a traditional personal loan lender — so consumers seeking cash loans will find it irrelevant. Financing terms, APR ranges, and lender details are not disclosed on the website, making it impossible to compare financing costs before visiting. The business serves a single Colorado Springs location, limiting access for buyers outside that metro area. Buyers with bad credit should expect subprime auto loan rates and should compare offers before committing.
pros: Veteran-owned and operated — clearly stated on homepage
Financing programs specifically for bad credit, no down payment, self-employed, and first-time buyers
4.5-star rating from 993 Google reviews — strong track record
Every vehicle includes a vehicle history report at no extra mention of cost
ASE-certified technicians in on-site repair shop servicing all makes and models
Streamlined purchase process — one customer review cited full purchase completed in under an hour
Family-run, single-location business with named staff and repeat-customer loyalty
cons: Financing terms, APR ranges, and lender details are not disclosed on the website
Single Colorado Springs location — not accessible to buyers outside the metro area
Auto purchase financing only — not a source of general-purpose cash or personal loans
Used vehicle inventory only — no new vehicles offered
No online pricing or payment estimator visible on the site for financing comparison
best_for: Bad credit buyers in Colorado Springs needing vehicle financing without a traditional lender
First-time car buyers who want a low-pressure, guided purchase experience
Self-employed individuals who struggle to qualify through bank or credit union auto loans
Local vehicle owners seeking an ASE-certified repair shop for ongoing maintenance
diagnosis: Mile High Car Company is best for Colorado Springs-area consumers with bad credit or limited savings who need vehicle purchase and financing handled in one place by a low-pressure, locally owned dealer. The main caveat is that this is an auto dealership — not a personal loan lender — and financing rates are not disclosed online, so buyers should obtain competing loan offers before signing to avoid overpaying on a subprime auto loan.
services: Used vehicle sales — SUVs, trucks, cars, minivans
Full financing application with bad credit programs
Vehicle history reports included with every vehicle
Brake inspection, rotor turning, and full brake replacement
